caption: A person's hand holds a long, white, cylindrical object and moves it across the interior of a vehicle's footwell. The setting is a dusty and worn automotive interior, featuring a dark metal pedal assembly and surrounding beige carpeting. The hand, visible from the wrist down, enters from the right side of the frame and gradually shifts the white tool from a higher position to a lower one. As the sequence progresses, the tool is lowered toward the metal pedal structure, passing over a black cable and a grey plastic component. The surroundings remain static, showing the aged materials and mechanical parts of the car's floor area. There are no visible logos, on-screen text, or other people present in the scene.
